title: Projekt Strato
description: A fun modpack improving the mechanical and magical side of the game
body:
**Projekt Strato**
---
This Modpack is about bringing back the feel of old modpacks, like _Project Ozone_ and the feel of modern Modpacks by merging the mechanical side of **Create**, with the exploration of **Ad Astra** and the difficulty of **Ice and Fire**, all while keeping Minecraft’s core gameplay smooth and satisfying with a selection of chosen Quality of Life mods. Bringing the feel of modern modded minecraft to meet the old days of Minecraft modding _Creating_ a fun and interesting expirence 


Allowing you too play the way you want, look the way you want and most importantly having fun!! You can build villages and get to know villagers or go adventures to find structures in the overworld and the nether
